targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
	p.CollectDate AS time
	, i.ServerName
  , ROUND((1-(CounterValue/size_mb))*100,2) USE_PCT
FROM META2_M_InstanceInfo i WITH(NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN TBL2_M_Perfmon p WITH(NOLOCK) ON i.InstanceID = p.InstanceID
CROSS APPLY (
	SELECT TOP 1 CAST(LEFT(ss.PhysicalMemory, CHARINDEX('(', ss.PhysicalMemory) - 1) AS decimal) size_mb
	FROM TBL2_M_ServerBasicInfo ss WITH(NOLOCK)
	WHERE i.InstanceID = ss.InstanceID
	ORDER BY CollectDate DESC
) s
WHERE p.CounterName = 'Memory\Available MBytes'
AND p.CollectDate BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
AND i.ServerName IN ($ServerName)
ORDER BY time

select  CollectDate as time, ServerName
       , ROUND((1-(CounterValue/size_mb))*100,2) USE_PCT
      -- , CounterValue, size_mb
    from (select distinct p.CollectDate, i.ServerName
               , p.CounterValue
               , CAST(LEFT(s.PhysicalMemory, CHARINDEX('(', s.PhysicalMemory) - 1) AS decimal) size_mb
            from META2_M_InstanceInfo i with (nolock)
               , (select ss.InstanceID, ss.PhysicalMemory
                       , rank() over(partition by instanceID order by CollectDate desc) rnk
                    from TBL2_M_ServerBasicInfo ss with (nolock)
                 ) s
               , TBL2_M_Perfmon p with (nolock)
    where s.rnk = 1
      and i.InstanceID = s.InstanceID
      and i.InstanceID = p.InstanceID
      and p.CounterName = 'Memory\Available MBytes'
      -- grafana utc issue
      -- solution : 
      -- 1. use default utc
      -- 2. use noraml time arg
      -- 3. use query option -> time shift -> 0d+9h
      and p.CollectDate between $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  ) as z
  WHERE ServerName IN ($ServerName)
  order by time
